description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 27 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 19 mins. His tracked work was split mostly between Other (40%) and Java (40%), with Markdown at 16%. The data does not list any public GitHub commits, repositories, PRs, or new repos for the week.
